items.original_title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.title_en: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.summary_en: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
items.title_zh: 美国通过州和联邦行动推进 AI 安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了联合治理的 AI 法规框架，州法律将帮助建立全国性的安全民主 AI 框架。这对 AI 行业的规范化具有重要意义。

items.original_title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
items.title_en: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
items.summary_en: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 现使用 AI 攻击自己的 AI，效果优于人类
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在其 AI 模型的安全性和对抗性方面取得了进展，内部模型 GPT-Red 的攻击成功率显著超过人工团队。这预示着 AI 自我检测和强化的未来。

items.original_title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
items.title_en: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are cal…
items.summary_en: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution. But the ambition runs well ahead of the reality: most deployed “agents” are still chatbot…
items.title_zh: 企业 AI 组织面临部署问题而非平台问题
items.summary_zh: 企业 AI 组织面临的主要问题在于部署，而非平台，许多部署的‘代理’仍然只是聊天机器人。这提示了企业在 AI 实施中的普遍低效现象。

items.original_title: Bonsai 27B is a full open reasoning model that fits on an iPhone
items.title_en: Bonsai 27B is a full open reasoning model that fits on an iPhone
items.summary_en: PrismML has compressed a 27-billion-parameter AI model to under 4 GB, small enough to run on an iPhone. In the company's own benchmarks, the smallest version keeps 90 percent of the original performance, with math and coding scores barely affected. Apple is reportedly already testing the compression technology, which…
items.title_zh: Bonsai 27B 是一个适用于 iPhone 的全功能推理模型
items.summary_zh: PrismML 将一个 27 亿参数的 AI 模型压缩到小于 4 GB，使其能够在 iPhone 上运行。这一技术发展可能会推动移动设备 AI 应用。

items.original_title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
items.title_en: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
items.summary_en: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.
items.title_zh: Rime 获得 2400 万美元系列 A 融资，帮助企业处理客户电话
items.summary_zh: 大规模客户通话处理的公司 Rime 获得 2400 万美元的 A 轮融资，展示了 AI 在客户服务领域的应用潜力。

items.original_title: GPT-5.6 Sol reportedly disproves a 30-year-old statistics conjecture in 90 minutes after humans couldn't crack it
items.title_en: GPT-5.6 Sol reportedly disproves a 30-year-old statistics conjecture in 90 minutes after humans couldn't crack it
items.summary_en: A University of Pennsylvania statistics professor used OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Pro to disprove a central open conjecture about the Benjamini-Hochberg method in roughly 90 minutes. The predecessor model, GPT-5.5, couldn't find a solution even after 20 hours. The answer combines known methods in a new way, keeping the bigg…
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 推翻了 30 年的统计猜想
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 在 90 分钟内推翻了一个 30 年的统计猜想，显示出 AI 在知识创造上的潜力，这为人类与 AI 的合作提供了新的视角。

items.summary_en: 半调纸拼贴 B-roll 生成 skill：三闸门审批，Gemini Omni Flash 首尾帧组装动画 | Editorial halftone paper-collage B-roll agent skill GitHub: 97 stars, 12 forks.
items.title_zh: GitHub 新项目：B-roll 视频生成技能
items.summary_zh: 新开源项目 gbro-collage-broll 允许创作者更轻松地制作 B-roll 视频，为视频编辑工具增加了实用性。
